title: Signoff: Packs core + database (03a, 03b)
description:
Run /plan-work-completion-signoff on these docs:
- docs/plans/03a-packs-core.md → internal/packs/ (core git, filesystem)
- docs/plans/03a-packs-core-test-harness.md → guard/ tests, internal/eval/ tests
- docs/plans/03b-packs-database.md → internal/packs/database.go
- docs/plans/03b-packs-database-test-harness.md → internal/eval/db_*_test.go

For each doc: read the plan thoroughly, compare every specified type/interface/function/algorithm against the actual code, run tests, then add a Completion Signoff section. Report gaps to dcg-scheduler.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Completion signoff pass finished. Updated 03a/03b plan + harness docs with Completion Signoff sections, all marked Partial due to plan/code gaps (safe-pattern runtime semantics not implemented, architecture mismatches, CI mapping divergence). Report sent to dcg-scheduler; commit 3d3eae2.
